name: Unified Amazon Metrics Orchestrator (Looped)
description: Registry-driven single-workflow orchestrator that loops over Amazon metric workflows, records skipped or dry-run metrics, executes selected child workflows, and returns one consolidated summary.

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
const registry = [
  { metricKey: 'bsr', displayName: 'Get BSR', workflowId: 'zC5vJ22Tb7i4dli8', dateMode: 'snapshot-metadata' },
  { metricKey: 'ads_spend', displayName: 'Get Ad Spend', workflowId: 'nWQo0Pz3qHzQO0My', dateMode: 'range-ready' },
  { metricKey: 'ctr', displayName: 'Get CTR', workflowId: 'wJaKKBJzcgUUoahu', dateMode: 'range-ready' },
  { metricKey: 'refunds', displayName: 'Get Refund', workflowId: 'mV21sXm6RdaCfPet', dateMode: 'range-ready' },
  { metricKey: 'sales_ppc', displayName: 'Get Sales PPC', workflowId: 'PzN4mNPLpYAS85WV', dateMode: 'range-ready' },
  { metricKey: 'clicks', displayName: 'Get Clicks', workflowId: 'iVZAWiAvfBrQVOpi', dateMode: 'range-ready' },
  { metricKey: 'units_ppc', displayName: 'Get Units PPC', workflowId: '0D4iLq9dHrac09vy', dateMode: 'range-ready' },
  { metricKey: 'fba_fbm_stock', displayName: 'Get FBA/FBM Stock', workflowId: 'T6pc0F0RULowHQu0', dateMode: 'snapshot-metadata' },
  { metricKey: 'sales_organic', displayName: 'Get Sales Organic', workflowId: 'KTNa277JLZ8hDZ89', dateMode: 'range-ready' },
  { metricKey: 'units_organic', displayName: 'Get Units Organic', workflowId: 'siWvymzWJu7Ns1VG', dateMode: 'range-ready' },
  { metricKey: 'reversal_reimbursement', displayName: 'Get Reversal Reimbursement', workflowId: 'fsJgfd11tF3nPprY', dateMode: 'range-ready' },
  { metricKey: 'fba_per_unit_fulfillment_fee', displayName: 'Get FBAPerUnitFulfillmentFee', workflowId: 'TLMr85JcV4bwDySu', dateMode: 'snapshot-metadata' },
];

return registry.map((metric, index) => ({
  json: {
    ...input,
    metricKey: metric.metricKey,
    displayName: metric.displayName,
    workflowId: metric.workflowId,
    dateMode: metric.dateMode,
    shouldRun: input.runAll || input.selectedMetrics.includes(metric.metricKey),
    shouldExecute: (input.runAll || input.selectedMetrics.includes(metric.metricKey)) && !input.dryRun,
    hasCurrentMetric: true,
    orchestrator: {
      index,
      metricKey: metric.metricKey,
      displayName: metric.displayName,
      workflowId: metric.workflowId,
      dateMode: metric.dateMode,
      startedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    },
  },
}));
return [{ json: { totals: { total: 0, success: 0, failed: 0, skipped: 0, dry_run: 0 }, summary: [] } }];
